options.content:
# Reports
Client-level reporting for Rogue Foods United (rfu-oregon). Mirrors Aetna Medicaid monthly report format. Each report has an **(i) info panel** explaining every field, its source table, and how to interpret it.

> Reports marked ⚠️ require FIS XTRACT feeds to be active (pending DM-03 confirmation).

## [🟢 Card Status](/d/onefintech-rpt-card-status/card-status-report)

**Audience:** Operations & Client Success

Who has a card? What is its status? FIS card ID, person ID, and CUID stamped after reconciliation. One row per member.

**Source tables:** `dim_card, dim_member`

[→ Open report](/d/onefintech-rpt-card-status/card-status-report)

## [🟢 Activation & Enrollment](/d/onefintech-rpt-enrollment/enrollment-report)

**Audience:** Operations & Client Success

How many members enrolled per batch file? Processing status by correlation ID. Funnel from STAGED → ACCEPTED.

**Source tables:** `fact_enrollments, dim_member`

[→ Open report](/d/onefintech-rpt-enrollment/enrollment-report)

## [🟢 Reconciliation](/d/onefintech-rpt-reconciliation/reconciliation-report)

**Audience:** Operations & Client Success

FIS result codes per record. MATCHED vs UNMATCHED. Which members have FIS identifiers stamped, and when.

**Source tables:** `fact_reconciliation, dim_member`

[→ Open report](/d/onefintech-rpt-reconciliation/reconciliation-report)

## [🟢 Authorization & Declines](/d/onefintech-rpt-auth/auth-report)

**Audience:** Operations & Client Success / Finance

Authorization approvals, declines, and reversals from FIS STDAUTH XTRACT. Decline rate by purse.

**Source tables:** `fact_authorization, dim_member — ⚠️ live once XTRACT feeds active`

[→ Open report](/d/onefintech-rpt-auth/auth-report)

## [🟢 Utilization Summary](/d/onefintech-rpt-utilization/utilization-report)

**Audience:** Operations & Client Success / Finance

Settled monetary transactions by member and purse. Purse-level closing balances. Spend by category from STDFSID.

**Source tables:** `fact_monetary, fact_account_balance — ⚠️ live once XTRACT feeds active`

[→ Open report](/d/onefintech-rpt-utilization/utilization-report)
